scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @campus-notifications/web" "npm run dev --workspace @campus-notifications/api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @campus-notifications/web && npm run build --workspace @campus-notifications/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @campus-notifications/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @campus-notifications/api
